mapper.insert: INSERT INTO storage_location (storage_location_id, name, created_at, updated_at) VALUES (#{storageLocationId}, #{name}, #{createdAt}, #{updatedAt})
mapper.select: SELECT FROM storage_location WHERE storage_location_id = #{storageLocationId} AND deleted_at IS NULL
SELECT FROM storage_location WHERE name = #{name} AND deleted_at IS NULL

SELECT COUNT(1) FROM storage_location WHERE deleted_at IS NULL
AND name ILIKE CONCAT('%', #{name}, '%')
